user.title: NDI Bridge
user.description: Enter the URL of your NDI Bridge addon. On HAOS the bridge is typically reachable at the HA host IP, e.g. http://192.168.1.x:8080.

select_source.title: Select NDI source
select_source.description: Choose the NDI source to display.

manual_source.title: Enter NDI source name
manual_source.description: No NDI sources were discovered automatically. Check multicast/mDNS networking, or enter the source name manually (format: 'HOSTNAME (SOURCE NAME)'). {hint}

error.cannot_reach_bridge: Could not reach the NDI Bridge. Check the URL and that the addon is running.

abort.already_configured: This NDI source is already configured.
